title: cgraph event metadata for btrain handoff events
description: Structured cgraph metadata that btrain stores in lane event details. Compact references to artifacts, not full payloads. Supports replay without parsing prose.

status.description: Overall cgraph integration status for this event. 'ok' = all requested commands succeeded. 'degraded' = some commands failed but handoff proceeded. 'unavailable' = cgraph binary missing or not configured.

degraded_reason.description: Short reason when status is 'degraded'. Absent when ok.

path.description: Relative path to the persisted review-packet artifact under .btrain/artifacts/cgraph/.

source.description: How the packet was built (mirrors review-packet.json source field).

touched_nodes.description: Number of code-entity nodes touched by the change.

advisory_count.description: Number of advisories in the packet.

truncated.description: True if the packet was truncated by --max-nodes.

path.description: Relative path to the persisted audit summary artifact.

standards_evaluated.description: How many standards rules were evaluated.

drift.description: Compact drift-check summary for the lane's locked files. Present when drift-check ran and succeeded. Full per-node detail lives in fresh_advisories[].

since.description: Claim timestamp (or explicit --since) used by drift-check as the comparison baseline.

drifted_nodes.description: Number of graph nodes whose lane-neighborhood changed since 'since'.

neighbor_files.description: Number of files in the drifted neighborhood.

fresh_advisories.description: Advisories surfaced by the current refresh that were not already live for this (lane, kind, context_hash). Empty/absent when nothing new surfaced.

resolved_advisories.description: Advisories that were live in .btrain/cgraph-advisory-state.jsonl but are no longer surfaced by the current refresh (e.g. overlap cleared after a lane resolved). Emitted so reviewers can see what just cleared.

graph_mode.description: Graph-role label. 'working/<lane>' or 'review/<lane>' when worktree isolation is available, 'shared-working' when falling back to shared worktree.

latency_ms.description: Per-command wall-clock latency in milliseconds. Keys are command kinds (e.g. blast_radius, review_packet, audit, drift_check); values are non-negative integers.

cgraphAdvisory.description: Normalized advisory entry used in fresh_advisories[] and resolved_advisories[]. Aggregates raw findings from blast-radius, drift-check, review-packet, and advise into one uniform shape.

kind.description: Taxonomy label (e.g. lock_overlap, drift, stale_index, packet_truncated). Defaults to 'unknown' when upstream provides nothing.

suggestion.description: Actionable suggestion from advise-situation lookup (may be empty).

rationale.description: Longer-form reasoning from advise-situation lookup (may be empty).

advisory_id.description: Stable id from advise (empty when not advise-linked).

context_hash.description: Short sha256 prefix keying this advisory into the live-state file.

other_lane_ids.description: Sorted, deduped lane ids involved in the advisory (used by lock_overlap).

overlapping_node_ids.description: Sorted, deduped node ids overlapping with other lanes (used by lock_overlap).

changed_node_ids.description: Sorted, deduped node ids that changed outside the lane (used by drift).

stale_file_paths.description: Sorted, deduped file paths flagged as stale in the graph index (used by stale_index).

truncated_node_ids.description: Sorted, deduped node ids dropped by packet truncation (used by packet_truncated).

handoff_id.description: Handoff identifier the advisory is pinned to (used by packet_truncated).
